examples:
Command Example
#
#### Human Readable Output
### sophos-central-isolate-endpoint
***
Isolate one or more endpoints.
#### Base Command
`sophos-central-isolate-endpoint`

outputs.description: The number of times the same exploit has been detected, potentially across multiple endpoints. SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.description The English description of the exploit detected event.
outputs.name: SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.count

outputs.description: The ID of this Exploit Mitigation application. SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.firstSeenAt Date
outputs.name: SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.id

outputs.description: SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.lastSeenAt Date When the exploit was last seen.
outputs.name: When the exploit was first seen.

outputs.description: The endpoint hostname. SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.lastEndpointId The unique endpoint ID.
outputs.name: SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.lastEndpointHostname

outputs.description: Person's name. SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.lastUserId The unique ID for the user.
outputs.name: SophosCentral.DetectedExploit.lastUserName
